prompt_text:
### Demographics: 65-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~30 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 99.8 kg; Height 172.1 cm; BMI 33.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.5%; 9 months ago 9.7%; 6 months ago 9.9%; 3 months ago 9.7%; current 9.5%), FPG (12 months ago 211mg/dL; 9 months ago 209mg/dL; 6 months ago 219mg/dL; 3 months ago 217mg/dL; current 243mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 101.3kg; 9 months ago 100.8kg; 6 months ago 99.2kg; 3 months ago 98.3kg; current 99.8kg), Height (12 months ago 172.1cm; 9 months ago 172.1cm; 6 months ago 172.1cm; 3 months ago 172.1cm; current 172.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 33.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 81mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 81mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 6U/L; 9 months ago 7U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 5.1U/L; current 11U/L), AST (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 12U/L; 3 months ago 17U/L; current 15U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 81mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 80mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 77mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 77mL/min/1.73m²; current 78mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 33mg/g; 9 months ago 34mg/g; 6 months ago 33mg/g; 3 months ago 49mg/g; current 44mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 93mg/dL; 9 months ago 98mg/dL; 6 months ago 98mg/dL; 3 months ago 98mg/dL; current 96mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 45mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 151mg/dL; 9 months ago 134mg/dL; 6 months ago 136mg/dL; 3 months ago 134mg/dL; current 143mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
